findings.description: JP '4人の登場人物' (4 persons/characters) translated as ZH '四类角色' (4 types of roles) and EN 'Four Key Roles'. Semantic shift from person-count to role-types; 'Key' in EN adds emphasis not present in JP source.
findings.jp_text: システム開発に関わる4人の登場人物
findings.zh_text: 参与系统开发的四类角色
findings.en_text: Four Key Roles Involved in System Development

findings.description: JP source text contains 'たいい方' which appears to be an OCR or source typo for '言い方' (way of saying). ZH and EN translations correctly render the intended meaning ('put another way'). JP text quality issue only.
findings.jp_text: もう少しだけたいい方をすると

findings.description: EN caption states 'System Life Cycle Process' is abbreviated as 'SLCP' as if universal fact. In standard English IT usage this abbreviation is Japan-exam-specific (both terms abbreviate to SLCP in Japanese katakana). EN learners may be misled. Japan-jurisdiction note missing from EN rendering.
findings.jp_text: システムライフサイクルプロセスも略すと「SLCP」
findings.zh_text: 系统生命周期过程缩写都是"SLCP"
findings.en_text: System Life Cycle Process are abbreviated as "SLCP"

findings.description: Cross-page inconsistency: 共通フレーム JP source uses '本' (book) consistently. p215::0 correctly renders ZH '书籍' / EN 'book'. p217::3 renders ZH '文献' (document/literature) and EN 'document' instead. '本/book' is factually accurate (published and sold commercially). Inconsistency may confuse learners.

Semantic error in EN definition for 'システム化計画の立案プロセス'. EN reads: 'system planning to embody the System Conception Planning Process'. JP source says 'システム化構想を具現化するため' = 'to materialize/realize the system CONCEPT'. EN incorrectly says the PROCESS is being embodied rather than the CONCEPT (構想). ZH correctly renders '为将系统化构想具体化' (to materialize the system concept). Error propagates identically in table row p219::table::row2 EN cell.
findings.jp_text: システム化構想を具現化するためのシステム化計画
findings.zh_text: 为将系统化构想具体化而制定系统化计划 (CORRECT)
findings.en_text: system planning to embody the System Conception Planning Process (ERROR - should be 'to realize the system concept/vision')

findings.description: Same EN semantic error as F005 propagated to table row for システム化計画の立案プロセス. Table EN cell: 'to embody the System Conception Planning Process' where it should say 'to realize/materialize the system concept'.
findings.jp_text: システム化構想を具現化するための
findings.zh_text: 为将系统化构想具体化 (CORRECT)
findings.en_text: to embody the System Conception Planning Process (ERROR)

findings.description: EN definition for '費用とシステム投資効果の予測' uses imperative verb form ('Calculate cost-effectiveness (ROI) and compare...') rather than noun phrase. Minor stylistic inconsistency with other definitions.
findings.jp_text: 費用対効果(ROI)を計算し、開発にかかる費用とシステムによって得られる効果を比較する
findings.en_text: Calculate cost-effectiveness (ROI) and compare the development costs against the benefits obtained from the system

findings.description: EN uses 'cost performance' as gloss for コストパフォーマンス (loan-word). 'Cost performance' is not standard English business terminology; 'cost-effectiveness' or 'value for money' would be more natural. Not factually wrong but unusual phrasing.
findings.jp_text: 費用対効果（コストパフォーマンス）

findings.description: leaf_count metadata field does not match serialized entity array length on 6 of 10 pages (214:3vs2, 215:6vs4, 217:18vs4, 218:4vs3, 219:16vs6, 220:4vs2). Likely counts sub-elements (list items, table cells) not individually serialized. Content entities appear complete. Metadata inconsistency only.
